# `foundations/dist/` — AUTO-GENERATED, DO NOT EDIT

This directory is regenerated by CI from `foundations/src/foundations.md`. Hand edits here are reverted on the next derive run.

## Layout (Pattern H — hierarchical)

Folder structure mirrors the MD heading hierarchy. Each leaf section (no child headings) becomes a `<slug>.json`; each branch becomes a `<slug>/` directory with `_index.json`.

```
foundations/dist/
  _index.json                          # root metadata + top-level child list
  foundations.md                       # verbatim copy of src (Stripe .md URL pattern)
  foundations.bundle.json              # full nested tree (one-shot LLM roll-up)
  tokens/
    _index.json                        # H2 "Tokens" metadata + child list + intro body/blocks
    motion.json                        # H3 "Motion" — structured {tokens, patterns} leaf
    typography/                        # H3 with H4 children → directory
      _index.json
      font-family.json
      font-weight.json
      ...
    border-tokens/
      _index.json
      radius.json
      width.json
      style-composite.json
    ...
  color-primitives-themes/
    _index.json
    oklch-shade-formula.json
    primitives/
      _index.json
      green.json
      orange.json
      ...
    ...
  foundations/                         # H2 "Foundations" (usage rules)
    _index.json
    color-usage-rules.json
    ...
  component-specs/
    _index.json
    ...
```

## How to consume

- **One-shot tree access**: read `foundations.bundle.json`. Single nested object — every leaf reachable from this one file.
- **Navigation**: start at `_index.json`; each `children[]` entry points at the next level (id, title, order).
- **Direct leaf access**: use `<topSlug>/<...>/<leaf>.json` (or `<topSlug>.json` if the H2 has no H3 children).
- **Stripe `.md` URL pattern**: `foundations/dist/foundations.md` is a verbatim copy of the source. Some agents fetch the MD directly and prefer it over JSON.

`paths-manifest.json` exposes the canonical pointers:
- `foundations.bundle` → `foundations.bundle.json`
- `foundations.index` → `_index.json`
- `foundations.source` → `foundations.md`
- `foundations.<topSlug>` → top-level _index.json (or leaf JSON)

The `foundations.leaf` collection in the manifest describes the per-leaf layout.

## Special case — Motion

The Motion section is detected by content shape (H4 children Duration + Easing + Delay). Even though its H4 children would normally imply a sub-directory, motion emits as a SINGLE structured leaf JSON (`tokens/motion.json`) to preserve the plugin's pattern-lookup API. Tokens live under `motion.tokens.{duration,easing,delay}`; named patterns under `motion.patterns.<slug>`.

## To change a token

Edit `foundations/src/foundations.md` — the `foundations-derive.yml` workflow regenerates every JSON in this directory on each PR that touches the source MD or parser scripts. The schema-less derive adapts to renumbers, renames, restructures.

## How CI writes here

`scripts/foundations/derive-foundations.js` walks the MD AST and emits one JSON per heading-tree node. See `foundations/src/AUTHORING.md` for the authoring guide.
